name: Moo Goo Gaipan #2
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh snow peas, stringed & halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any fat or tendons from the chicken and slice into pieces about 1 inch by 1 inch (this works better if the chicken is partially frozen).
2. Mix the chicken with the next three ingredients and allow to marinate while preparing the vegetables.
3. Wash bok choy thoroughly, trim off the tough ends of the leaves and part of the base, and chop into bite-size pieces including the green parts.
4. Slice the mushrooms.
5. Cut the snow peas in half or slice after removing the tips and strings.
6. Mix the stock and corn starch in a shaker.
7. Heat oil in a wok until almost smoking and then stir fry the chicken until nearly cooked through.
8. Add the vegetables and stir fry until the bok choy leaves get slightly wilted down.
9. Pour in the stock/cornstarch mixture that was shaken just before pouring it in.
10. Stir constantly until the sauce thickens.
11. Serve immediately over cooked rice.
